name: isEqual
description: The standalone lodash.isEqual package as a vendorable file. Useful when you need lodash's deep equality behavior without adding the package to your dependency graph.
tagline: Compare values deeply with lodash semantics.
summary: This page ships the published lodash.isEqual file in both raw and normalized forms. The value is to vendor an existing deep-equality contract rather than improvise one.
nativeAlternative: Object.is and direct comparison are insufficient for deep equality, and custom deep-equal helpers often diverge subtly from lodash behavior.

variants.label: Normalized
variants.note: Rule-based normalization for modern TS projects. The goal is easier import and build compatibility, not changed behavior.

variants.label: Raw
variants.note: Published package file kept as-is for older teams or repos that still prefer the original CommonJS distribution.

note: Raw and normalized views are both available. Use normalized when you want an ESM and TypeScript-friendly file, and raw when you want the original published package shape.
